meta.name: dictation-to-bash
meta.description: Round-trip test: spoken bash commands → reconstructed syntax. Each entry has the original bash command, how a transcription engine (Whisper/Parakeet) would capture it when spoken aloud, and the expected reconstructed output.

categories.paths: Commands with complex paths (tilde, dots, escaping)
categories.compound: Multi-part commands combining several syntax patterns
categories.tools: Project-specific CLI tools (talkie-dev, bun, brew, etc.)

difficulty_levels.medium: One or two syntax transformations needed
difficulty_levels.hard: Multiple transformations, complex syntax, easy to get wrong
